name: Blueberry Bread Machine Made
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Frozen blueberries; thawed; reserve liquid
1/4 cup Retained juice; at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all dry ingredients to the bread machine pan.
2. Place the berries with the dry ingredients.
3. For a 1.5 lb loaf, use 300 cc of liquid at 90°F.
4. Select thin top crust and start the machine.
